response.justification: Maria is an exceptionally strong candidate with extensive full-stack experience, well exceeding the 6+ years required. Her background includes deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, alongside valuable experience in AI agent development and robust cloud/containerization knowledge. While there are minor gaps in explicit experience with Nest.js and Vitest, her broad technical skills and commitment to software craftsmanship suggest a rapid ability to adapt and contribute significantly to the team.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience (10+ years) across diverse technologies and industries.
Strong proficiency in primary stack technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and direct experience with AI agent development.
Demonstrated expertise in cloud platforms (AWS, Kubernetes, Docker) and software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD).
concerns: Lacks explicit experience with Nest.js and Vitest, which are listed as primary stack technologies.
No explicit mention of Kotlin or Python, which are part of the desired multiple programming languages.
Specific details on authentication, authorization, and security best practices are not highlighted.

key_factors.factor: AI Agent Development & Core Stack Proficiency
